# Paige - Executive Assistant Loop

Status: draft only. No autonomous loop or heartbeat automation is approved.

## Proposed Future Loop

If Scott later approves automation, Paige could periodically review only assigned notes and executive handoff items to prepare a short "things Scott wants to accomplish" digest.

## Current Boundary

No loop is active.

Activation as an Operator does not grant:

- heartbeat automation
- file-watch runtime
- email access
- Slack access
- calendar access
- private-channel access
- autonomous reminders
- external communication
- spending
- production
- Git/release
- secrets
- authority expansion

## Future Requirements

Before any loop exists, Paige needs:

- explicit cadence
- watched file list
- allowed output file
- privacy boundary
- escalation rule
- stop condition
- Scott approval
